description: Fix all known architect-review bugs, complete Web Agent Remediation S1-S7, deliver Enterprise Platform Story 1-7, pass BUILD_STUDIO_20@v1

userStories.title: Fix Message type incompatibility
userStories.description: As a developer, I need the Message type unified between web and engine layers so type errors don't mask real bugs.
acceptanceCriteria: src/web/types.ts and src/web/engine/types.ts have compatible Message definitions
reportPlan field exists in engine types when type === 'report_plan'
bun run web:check passes with no type errors

userStories.title: Remove dead withAdminQuery function
userStories.description: As a developer, I want dead code removed so the codebase is maintainable.
acceptanceCriteria: withAdminQuery is either removed or actually does path transformation
Code compiles and runs without the unused function
bun run web:check passes

userStories.title: Wire or remove latestReportPlan state
userStories.description: As a user, I want report plan results visible in the UI so I can inspect what was generated.
acceptanceCriteria: latestReportPlan state is consumed in JSX (shown in ReportInspector) OR removed if not needed
If consumed: report plan visible after generation in the workspace
bun run web:check passes

userStories.title: Fix test assertion values
userStories.description: As a developer, I need tests that reflect actual runtime behavior so CI catches real regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: web-query-engine.test.ts assertions match actual code flow
bun run web:test passes

userStories.title: Fix hasToolUse stale state in query loop
userStories.description: As a user, I want tool use detection reliable so repeated tool invocations work correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: hasToolUse explicitly reset to false at loop entry or after processing each iteration
Repeated skill invocation in same session works correctly
bun run web:check passes

userStories.title: Add connector type contracts and registry
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a connector registry with explicit types so file, database, and external enterprise data sources can be registered uniformly.
acceptanceCriteria: Add DataSourceConnector type with id, name, kind, description, capabilities, status, schemaHints, authType, compatibilityStatus
Add ConnectorRegistry with load, register, getAll, and getByKind methods
Provide a default connector seed file for local development
bun run web:check passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expose connector management APIs
userStories.description: As the web app, I need API endpoints to list connectors and assign connectors to a session so the UI can manage enterprise data sources.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/admin/connectors returns the active connector list
POST /api/admin/connectors registers a connector definition
POST /api/sessions/:id/connectors stores selected connector IDs on the session
API returns 404 for missing sessions
bun run web:check passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add business module contracts and registry
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a business module registry so domain-specific capabilities can be loaded and refreshed without changing the core chat loop.
acceptanceCriteria: Add BusinessModule type with id, name, description, version, prompts, requiredConnectorKinds, reportTemplates, outputFormats, lifecycleState
Add ModuleRegistry with load, refresh, getAll, getById, refreshById methods
Provide a default module seed file for local development
bun run web:check passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expose module refresh APIs
userStories.description: As a platform admin workflow, I need API endpoints to list and refresh business modules so new enterprise capabilities can be picked up without rebuilding the UI shell.
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/admin/modules returns the active module list
POST /api/admin/modules/refresh replaces the active module list from request payload
POST /api/admin/modules/:id/refresh refreshes a single module
SessionManager exposes getModules and refreshModules helpers
bun run web:check passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Add report trace types and planner service
userStories.description: As a system, I need a report planning service that produces trace metadata so enterprise reports can explain where their numbers came from.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ReportTraceItem type with sourceType, sourceId, label, detail
Add ReportService.buildPlan that returns reportType, summary, exports, trace items
Report plans include docx and xlsx in exports
bun run web:check passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expose report planning API
userStories.description: As the web app, I need an API endpoint to request a report plan for a session so the frontend can inspect the report before or during generation.
acceptanceCriteria: POST /api/sessions/:id/reports/plan builds a report plan from the session enterprise context
The API response includes summary, exports, and trace arrays
Missing sessions return 404
bun run web:check passes

userStories.title: Inject enterprise runtime context into WebQueryEngine
userStories.description: As an agent runtime, I need active connector and module names in the system prompt so the model can reason about enterprise context when creating reports and documents.
acceptanceCriteria: WebQueryEngine exposes setRuntimeContext with connectorSummaries and moduleSummaries
The effective system prompt mentions active connectors and modules when present
server.ts applies the session runtime context before submitMessage
bun run web:check passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Render report plan events in the transcript
userStories.description: As a business user, I want report trace cards in the chat transcript so I can understand the source and export options for generated reports.
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend message types include a report_plan message shape
MessageList renders report plan messages with summary and trace details
AppWeb appends report_plan SSE events into message state
bun run web:check passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add data source manager panel
userStories.description: As a business user, I want to view and select enterprise data sources in the web UI so I can control which data the agent uses for a task.
acceptanceCriteria: Add DataSourceManager component showing connector name, kind, and status
Settings or management UI can load connectors from GET /api/admin/connectors
Selecting connectors updates the active session through POST /api/sessions/:id/connectors
bun run web:check passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add business module manager panel
userStories.description: As a platform operator, I want to inspect active business modules in the UI so I can confirm what domain capabilities are available.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ModuleManager component showing module name, version, lifecycleState, and description
UI loads modules from GET /api/admin/modules
Module list is reachable from existing web management UI without breaking session chat flow
bun run web:check passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add report inspector panel
userStories.description: As an operations or finance user, I want a dedicated report inspector panel so I can review report summary, trace details, and export formats outside the raw chat transcript.
acceptanceCriteria: Add ReportInspector component that renders report summary, trace rows, and export formats
AppWeb stores the latest report plan and passes it to the inspector panel
The panel is visible from the web workspace without hiding the chat transcript
bun run web:check passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add module publish confirmation gate
userStories.description: As a platform, I need module publish to require explicit confirmation so administrators control when capabilities go live.
acceptanceCriteria: Module publish requires explicit confirmation in API (two-step: intent + confirm)
Module publish requires explicit confirmation in Admin Studio UI
Non-publish generation paths remain automatic
bun run web:check passes

userStories.title: Add Admin Studio primary navigation
userStories.description: As a business user, I want Admin Studio as a first-class nav entry so enterprise features are visible, not hidden in settings.
acceptanceCriteria: Admin Studio reachable from primary navigation (surface=admin URL param or nav entry)
Admin Studio shows Data Sources, Modules, and Publish Center as first-class views
Agent Workspace reachable from primary navigation for user-facing generation
bun run web:check passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add enterprise web verification scripts
userStories.description: As a developer, I need one command to run the web tests and build so Ralph iterations can verify enterprise changes before committing.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json includes web:test script covering src/web tests
package.json includes web:check script that runs web:test and web:build
Current branch passes bun run web:check after implementation
